Index.meta_title: MarkM8 - AI Essay Grading for Students | Know Your Grade Before You Submit
Index.meta_description: Get instant AI-powered essay feedback and grades before you submit. Three AI models analyze your work for accurate, unbiased grading. Just $1 per essay.

Hero.title: Know Your <important>Grade</important> Before You Submit
Hero.description: Stop guessing. Get instant AI-powered feedback on your essays with the same rigor as your professors. Three AI graders analyze your work to give you accurate, actionable insights.

Features.section_title: Essay Feedback That Actually Helps You Improve
Features.section_description: No more waiting weeks for grades. No more vague feedback. Get detailed, actionable insights in minutes.
Features.feature1_description: Three independent AI models grade your essay separately, then we combine their insights. This eliminates bias and ensures you get the most accurate assessment possible.
Features.feature2_description: Get your grade and detailed feedback in under 2 minutes. Perfect for those late-night deadline crunches when you need to know if your essay is ready.
Features.feature3_description: Upload your professor's actual rubric or assignment brief. We grade against exactly what your instructor is looking for, not generic essay standards.
Features.feature4_description: See exactly where you're losing points. Get specific suggestions for improvement on thesis, evidence, structure, and style—not just a letter grade.
Features.feature5_description: Receive a realistic grade range (e.g., B+ to A-) based on AI consensus. Know your floor and ceiling before you submit.
Features.feature6_description: Regrade your essay after making changes. Each submission is just $1, so you can iterate until you're confident in your work.

HowItWorks.section_description: Get professional-grade feedback on your essay in three simple steps.
HowItWorks.step1_description: Copy your essay into our editor. Add your assignment brief and rubric for the most accurate grading.
HowItWorks.step2_description: Three AI models independently analyze your essay against your rubric. We combine their assessments for accuracy.
HowItWorks.step3_description: Receive your predicted grade range, detailed feedback, and specific suggestions for improvement.

Testimonials.testimonial1_quote: I was getting B-'s on my history essays and couldn't figure out why. MarkM8 showed me my arguments were solid but my thesis statements were weak. Next paper? A-.
Testimonials.testimonial2_quote: The night before my final paper was due, I ran it through MarkM8. It caught that I'd completely missed addressing part of the prompt. That $1 probably saved my grade.
Testimonials.testimonial3_quote: As an international student, I was always worried about my writing. MarkM8 gives me confidence before submitting. My writing has improved so much.

Pricing.section_title: Pay Per Essay, Not Per Month
Pricing.section_description: No subscriptions. No commitments. Just pay for what you use. Every new account gets 1 free credit to try it out.

FAQ.answer1: Our triple AI consensus system provides remarkably accurate predictions. By using three independent AI models and combining their assessments, we eliminate individual model biases. Most students report their MarkM8 grade is within one grade increment (e.g., B+ vs A-) of their actual grade.
FAQ.answer2: Absolutely not. MarkM8 is a feedback tool, just like having a friend review your essay or visiting the writing center. You're still doing all the writing—we're just helping you understand how it might be received. Think of it as a practice run before the real submission.
FAQ.question3: Can I use my professor's actual rubric?
FAQ.answer3: Yes! In fact, we encourage it. When you include your assignment brief and rubric, our AI grades against those specific criteria rather than generic essay standards. This gives you the most accurate and relevant feedback possible.
FAQ.question4: How fast do I get my results?
FAQ.answer4: Most essays are graded in under 2 minutes. Complex or longer essays may take slightly longer, but you'll typically have your results within 5 minutes at most.
FAQ.question5: What if I disagree with the grade?
FAQ.answer5: The grade is a prediction based on AI analysis. If you disagree, use the detailed feedback to understand why the AI scored it that way. Often, students find insights they missed. You can always revise and resubmit for another $1.
FAQ.answer6: Completely. Your essays are encrypted, never used for AI training, and automatically deleted after 30 days. We never share your content with anyone. Your academic work remains yours.
